title: Don't Stop, Reach For That Brilliance

text_block_list.text:
——It was late in the afternoon of a day off. While out and about, I 
ran in to Ai. She asked me to be her partner in a Quiz Challenge duo.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
When I entered the shop, there was a contest 
happening……If you answer all the question correctly, 
you get a pair of Kyumaru dolls! So please!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
This cute and cozy Kappa carrying a cucumber. 
Isn't it really cute♪?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: I've always really liked Kyumaru, since a long time ago……so please!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——You're the one that needs to answer the next 
question, Trainer. Let's believe in Beginner's Luck!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
And here's your question! This Kappa, Kyumaru's—— 
Neighbor, Uncle Puffin has a niece. What is the 
name of the clownfish she keeps as a pet?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a minute! 
That question is to core for Trainer-san……!
choice_data_list: (Like hell I'd know～!!) Is it Tama-chan?

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, that's incorrect! 
And so this challenge comes to an end! Feel free to try again～!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It's so frustrating! To think they'd 
ask so many core questions like that!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It can't be helped, don't worry about it. 
A question like that, I don't think most of 
even the die hard fans would be able to answer it……

Almond Eye was trying to be considerate, but it was pretty 
obvious by her expression that she was frustrated at losing.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Ehh? Next time——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Trainer, will you go with me next time……?
choice_data_list: Of course. Let's get our revenge!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……!! Yeah, that's what I wanna hear! 
Next time we'll get all of them right!

We acted immediately on that idea. 
Almond Eye and I headed to a place to study for the quiz ahead.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
At this Karaoke place, you can even play videos. 
——Shall we watch some of the older Anime movies together?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Fufu……♪ Kyumaru really is cute, right? 
Really liking cucumbers, I can sympathize with that.
choice_data_list: Is that why you like Kyumaru?
Is that why you like Kyumaru?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm……that's a part of it, but also, how, in order to 
find his long-lost mother, he's honestly working to 
get stronger to face any challenge that comes his way.
choice_data_list: Straight for their goal……Just like Ai

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that might be it too. ……Ah, look. I really 
recommend watching this scene! The way Kyumaru 
musters up his courage for the sake of his mother is great.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……Huh? 
Trainer, your eyes are kind of red, you know? Are you okay?
choice_data_list: That last scene was so moving……

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that one, huh……! 
The first time I saw it, my eyes welled up too.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
But……even though it's painful to be apart, for his mother he continues 
his journey. It was a story that reaffirmed Kyumaru's strength.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——Alright. Now that the movie is over, let's review 
and think about some potential questions that might 
show up on the quiz! That's our next step!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
A Collab Cafe! It's getting close to lunchtime 
so it'll be like two birds with one stone, right?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Earl Seal's cream pankcakes or Todosuke's omelette soba——It was a 
really hard choice, but getting them both was the correct decision♪

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer's Greedy Plate is really cute too……! 
Can I take a picture of it?

——And so the two of us enjoyed the Collab menu. 
Once she had sated her hunger, she took out her notebook.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I've gathered all the Kyumaru info in here! 
『Lets work hard and study together-Kyu～♪』, just kidding.
choice_data_list: Oooh, you sound just like Kyumaru!
Oooh, you sound just like Kyumaru!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Fufu, it's really similar, right? 
They might have us do an impersonation so we'll be perfectly ready!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
The story episodes written on the tag is different for 
each stuffed animal. We need to keep that in mind too.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Alright, let's get them all! 
We'll start with Kyumaru riding a cucumber!
choice_data_list: (Pushing herself to the limit as usual)

text_block_list.text:
Most people would probably think 『Do you really need to go that far?』 
But Almond Eye was not afraid to take on that challenge.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
——I did it! I got three at the same time! 
Fufufuu……it went just like I imagined!!
Always going full strength——and always having fun.

Together at her side, we'd go all out to get our revenge—— 
I have to put in the effort to match hers.

And so on the next day off, we challenged the quiz again. 
Each of us has to alternate answering the questions, one by one——
choice_data_list: Kyumaru looks up to Dancing Penguin!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
The number of cucumbers on the 3rd Anniversary Emblem? 
——3x3, so, of course 9!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! Next is the final question! 
——The Onii-san over there, are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! Next is the final question! 
——The Onee-san over there, are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: Then, in the movie 『Kyumaru's Grand Adventure』——

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
The multi-banded Butterfly Fish that appears midway 
through, how many bands does it have on its body? 
How many are on each side, and how many are long and short?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, as expected of a last question…… 
You wouldn't know that unless you looked very closely)
choice_data_list: On top, 2 on each side. 3 Long ones——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
choice_data_list: And one short one under the fins!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
——Correct!! You were able to answer every 
question so you've completed this challenge!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text:
Wow～ that was amazing! For someone who only 
recently learned about Kyumaru, that was a surprise!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Amazing……that was amazing, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
That was something we didn't even cover at our 
last study session, you know? You really studied……!
choice_data_list: Just like you, I hate losing
Just like you, I hate losing

text_block_list.text:
Seeing Almond Eye frustrated made me also feel frustrated. 
If she wanted revenge, then I wanted to help her——

That's why I studied even on my own, 
reviewing everything I learned from Almond Eye.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Everything……from the movie we saw in the karaoke booth, our 
chat in the cafe, and what we studied together——all of that?

I also saw a few other movies as well after that. 
They sometimes had me in tears——

And after enjoying the delicious food at that collab cafe, 
I did a study session to attempt to do some impersonations——

I reviewed all the places and things I'd seen together with Almond Eye, 
preparing meticulously. I went as deep in to the lore as I could.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: All of that for this revenge match……?

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: ——……I see……

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……Fufu. ……Fufuu……Fufu, ahahahahaa! That's right. 
That's just……the kind of person you are!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer! 
Thanks to you, we were able to obtain the ultimate victory.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right! For Trainer too—— 
Here, one of the Kyumaru prizes
choice_data_list: It's fine for Ai to keep both

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
No way! We won them together, 
so you should take one too!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'll treasure mine too. 
——It's a trophy to commemorate our revenge victory♪
